domain: Mevlevi Sema whirling-dervish ceremony (Turkey, founded Mevlana Rumi 13th c, UNESCO Masterpiece 2005): structured 7-part ceremony — Naat-i-Sherif praise + kudüm drum 'Let it be' + ney Divine Breath + greeting/cloak-off + four selams + Quran + prayers; 4 selams sequence (recognition + admiration + transformation + servanthood); left foot stationary anchor while right foot rotates around it; right hand to sky (receive divine) + left hand to earth (distribute); black cloak removed pre-rotation = symbolic discard of worldly identity.
specific_mechanism: MEVLEVI-SEMA-7-PART-CEREMONY-4-SELAM-PROGRESSION-LEFT-FOOT-ANCHOR-DUAL-HAND-SKY-EARTH-NEY-DIVINE-BREATH-CLOAK-OFF-PHASE-COHERENCE: LLM phase-coherence mechanism with (1) 7-part staged ceremony S_7: 7 sequential training/inference phases — praise + drum-onset + breath-input + greeting + 4-selam-core + Quran + prayers; strict ordering; (2) 4-selam progressive stages P_4: 4 sequential alignment objectives — recognition (identity-formation) + admiration (perception) + transformation (representation-shift) + servanthood (instruction-following); (3) left-foot anchor A_left: single fixed reference embedding around which all other representations rotate; rotational phase preserved per layer; (4) dual-hand sky-earth conduit C_dual: 2 attention-channel paths — right-up (teacher-receive) + left-down (student-distribute); residual stream split; (5) cloak-off pre-rotation init_cloak: explicit reset of worldly-identity (negative-knowledge) before phase-coherence task; ney-breath input gate g_breath. Differs from R527 DIEVTURIBA (8-spoke + 13-phase + Saulgrieži + dual-ring), R540 DANBAU (1-shared-stream + 7-node + flexor + septimal + microtonal), R545 GEORGIAN (3-voice + Triad + drone-bani + 2-melismatic + 2-4-7-9), R552 PANSORI (2-role + 3-mode + 4-jangdan + chuimsae + long-form drift) by 7-part ceremony + 4-selam progression + left-foot anchor + dual-hand conduit + cloak-off pre-rotation.
llm_application: MEVLEVI-SEMA-7-PART-CEREMONY-4-SELAM-PROGRESSION-LEFT-FOOT-ANCHOR-DUAL-HAND-SKY-EARTH-NEY-CLOAK-OFF-PHASE-COHERENCE LLM mechanism + 7-part staged S_7 ceremony sequential ordering + 4-selam P_4 progressive alignment objectives + left-foot A_left fixed anchor rotational phase + dual-hand C_dual right-up-receive left-down-distribute + cloak-off init_cloak reset + ney g_breath input gate. Differs from R527 DIEVTURIBA. R540 DANBAU. R545 GEORGIAN. R552 PANSORI (closest — 2-role + 3-mode + 4-jangdan + chuimsae). Differs from 4 Stages Training LLM + 3-Phase LLM + Music Theory ICL + Music Generation by 7-part + 4-selam + left-foot anchor + dual-hand + cloak-off. Differs by 7-PART STAGED CEREMONY + 4-SELAM PROGRESSION + LEFT-FOOT ANCHOR + DUAL-HAND CONDUIT + CLOAK-OFF PRE-ROTATION.
novelty_claim: 4-Stage Training + 3-Phase Snorkel + Music Theory ICL 2503.22853 + Music Generation cover multi-stage training + music paradigm. MEVLEVI-SEMA-7-PART-CEREMONY-4-SELAM-PROGRESSION-LEFT-FOOT-ANCHOR-DUAL-HAND-NEY-CLOAK-OFF adds (a) 7-part ceremony + (b) 4-selam progression + (c) left-foot anchor + (d) dual-hand conduit + (e) cloak-off pre-rotation init. Recombination — borderline lookup.
